name: one-dice-online
description: Base online do One Dice com Node.js, PostgreSQL, Socket.IO e Docker.

scripts.check: node --check client/script.js && node --check client/obs.js && node --check server/server.js && node --check server/database.js && node --check server/middleware.js && node --check server/routes/auth.js && node --check server/routes/characters.js && node --check server/routes/tables.js && node --check server/sockets/index.js
scripts.health: node -e "require('./package.json'); console.log('One Dice health check ready')"
